verdicts.note: Community candidacy and absence of an elected record do not establish an explicit renewal or new-voice argument, much less the maximal pole.
Business and community experience are documented, but the dossier does not present generational change, outsider renewal, or a new-voice case.
Spending restraint is explicit, but one broad priority without a specific mechanism or repeated record supports a modest rather than maximal placement.

review_notes: All six pairs were checked. Direct incumbent and PUD records support negative experience scores; unelaborated challenger status does not support positive ones.
